overview: CREATEai by angieCREATEs is a premium all-in-one AI-powered fashion platform for designers and e-commerce teams. It unifies design, visualization, and commerce through 7 modular AI studios in a dark luxury editorial UI with gold accents.
features: 7 AI Studios: The Design Atelier, The Mirror Studio, The Model Forge, The Style Compass, The Brand Vault, The Precision Lab, The Trend Intelligence
48 shimmer-effect feature tiles with elevated branded names
Dark luxury editorial UI with onyxCREATE gold shimmer
User dashboard with API key management
